## Checklist

- [ ] `just ci` passes
- [ ] docs updated in the same change (README, the spec, the relevant guide) when the code or the wire contract changed
- [ ] prose has no semicolons and no em-dashes (only "TL;DR" is exempt)
- [ ] new tests are named given / when / then / should and use `.expect("message")`
- [ ] no internal-only detail leaked into shipped files
